basic_info.name: Hainan R&F Ocean Paradise / R&F Water World (海南富力海洋欢乐世界 / 富力水世界)
basic_info.location: No. 1 Shuanghu Avenue, Li'an Town, Lingshui Li Autonomous County, Hainan Province, China (海南省陵水黎族自治县黎安镇双湖大道1号)
basic_info.operator: R&F Properties (富力地产) - cultural tourism division; on-site Hyatt Regency Hainan Ocean Paradise Resort operated by Hyatt Hotels Corporation

technical_specs.wave_technology_brand: Not publicly disclosed; family-recreational wave generation system (likely WhiteWater West or comparable Chinese OEM) [uncertain]
technical_specs.pool_size: Wave pool over 4,000 m²; entire R&F Water World occupies a portion of the broader 870-acre park footprint
technical_specs.wave_height: Up to approximately 1.5 m at peak wave cycles (recreational family waves, not surf-grade) [uncertain]
technical_specs.wave_height_adjustability: Wave intensity cycles between calm and peak (~1.5 m) on a programmed schedule; specific named tier levels not publicly published [uncertain]
technical_specs.wave_types: Recreational rolling/surge waves for floating, bobbing, and bodyboarding in the central wave bay; not designed for stand-up surfing or barrel waves
technical_specs.waves_per_hour: Operates in cycles of active wave sets followed by rest intervals; specific waves-per-hour rate not publicly documented [uncertain]
technical_specs.wave_count_per_set: Set durations and per-set wave counts not publicly published; typical family wave pool cycles run several minutes of waves followed by calm intervals [uncertain]
technical_specs.session_length: Continuous access during park operating hours; no per-session time limit on the wave pool [uncertain]
technical_specs.stance_rotation_schedule: N/A - not a surfing-focused pool; no Goofy/Regular rotation
technical_specs.wave_type_classification: Artificial recreational family wave pool; not a dedicated surf-shaped wave pool

pricing_sessions.price_range: R&F Water World adult day ticket approximately RMB 178 (promotional) to RMB 268 (peak); combined Ocean Paradise + Water World adult day ticket approximately RMB 278-368; child / senior / military discount tickets available; free for hotel guests on selected packages [uncertain on current 2026 pricing]
pricing_sessions.session_skill_tiers: N/A - no skill-tiered surf sessions; single general admission grants access to wave pool and all 16 water rides
pricing_sessions.equipment_rental: Life jackets provided free; lockers, towels, swimwear, and bodyboards available for rent on-site (typical RMB 30-80 deposits) [uncertain on exact current fees]
pricing_sessions.coaching_fee: N/A - no surf coaching offered; the park is recreational family-oriented
pricing_sessions.membership_program: R&F resort offers annual passes and combo tickets bundling Ocean Paradise + Water World + Hyatt Regency stays; specific Water-World-only annual pass pricing not publicly listed [uncertain]
pricing_sessions.corporate_team_building: Yes - the resort actively markets MICE and team-building packages through Hyatt Regency and R&F resort sales; minimum group size and pricing handled case-by-case [uncertain on published rates]

experience_guide.best_season: Water World typically operates seasonally April-October when air and sea temperatures are warmest; the broader Ocean Paradise marine park operates year-round. Avoid Chinese national holidays (Spring Festival, Labor Day, National Day Golden Week, July-August summer break) for shorter queues
experience_guide.best_swell_window: N/A - artificial wave pool, not a natural surf spot
experience_guide.crowd_level: Very high during Chinese public holidays and summer school break; moderate on weekends; relatively quiet on weekdays in shoulder season (April, May, September, October). Newer park with less name-recognition than Atlantis Sanya so generally less crowded than Haitang Bay competitors
experience_guide.booking_method: Online pre-purchase strongly recommended via OTAs and the park's official WeChat mini program; tickets also sold at the park gate
experience_guide.booking_platform: Ctrip (携程) / Trip.com, Meituan-Dianping (大众点评), Fliggy (飞猪), Qunar (去哪儿), Douyin (抖音), official R&F Ocean Paradise WeChat mini program (海南海洋欢乐世界 official account)
experience_guide.payment_options: Alipay, WeChat Pay, UnionPay, cash (RMB); international credit cards accepted at the on-site Hyatt Regency hotel but limited acceptance at park ticket counters [uncertain on current international card support at park gate]
experience_guide.skill_required: Zero - no surfing skill required; suitable for non-swimmers in shallow areas with life jackets and lifeguard supervision
experience_guide.age_eligibility: Children under 1.0 m height free; 1.0 m to 1.4 m children's ticket; over 1.4 m adult ticket. Children under 16 require adult supervision. Some thrill water slides have minimum 1.2 m or 1.4 m height requirements; guests over 60 years or weighing over 90 kg may be restricted from select rides [uncertain on exact wave-pool-specific limits]
experience_guide.child_friendly_score: 5 - explicitly marketed as a family/parent-child destination; large kids' play zone, baby slide ('宝贝溜溜滑'), zero-entry shallow areas, free life jackets, and lifeguards; co-located with the marine animal park makes a full family day out
experience_guide.sup_paddleboard_offering: Not offered as a structured program at the wave pool [uncertain]
experience_guide.photography_video_service: On-site professional photographers at major slides and wave pool; photo packages sold at exit kiosks; pricing varies seasonally [uncertain on exact current rates]
experience_guide.language_support: Mandarin primary; limited English support at ticket counters; full multilingual service (English / Russian / Cantonese) at the on-site Hyatt Regency hotel front desk and concierge
experience_guide.accessibility_for_disabled: General park pathways are wheelchair accessible; persons with valid disability ID receive discounted or free admission; no dedicated adaptive surfing program at the wave pool [uncertain on detailed wave-pool entry accessibility]
experience_guide.stance_preference_input: N/A - not a surf training pool
experience_guide.safety_notes: Lifeguards posted at all pools and water attractions per Chinese national waterpark safety standards; mandatory life jackets for non-swimmers and children; pre-set wave cycle warnings broadcast before each set; pregnant women, those with heart conditions, recent surgery patients, and intoxicated guests prohibited from the wave pool. Personal accident insurance bundled into ticket per Chinese theme park regulations
experience_guide.events_competitions_calendar: Hosts seasonal entertainment shows (DJ pool parties, electronic music events, holiday-themed performances) at the wave pool; does not host competitive surfing events

surroundings.nearby_accommodation: Multiple R&F-developed properties around the resort; nearby Li'an Lagoon and Qingshui Bay (Clearwater Bay) hotels including The Sanya EDITION, Mingshen Goldenpalm Resort, Nantian Hot Springs Resort, with rates RMB 800-3,500+ per night
surroundings.on_site_accommodation: Hyatt Regency Hainan Ocean Paradise Resort - approximately 1,000 rooms (the first 1,000-room Hyatt Regency in Greater China); rates from approximately RMB 1,200-3,500 per night including breakfast; multiple restaurants, three swimming pools, kids club, and direct waterpark access; resort-stay packages bundle Ocean Paradise tickets
surroundings.nearby_food: On-site: 2 themed restaurants inside R&F Water World plus multiple F&B outlets within Ocean Paradise marine park; Hyatt Regency offers all-day dining, Cantonese, Italian, and pool-bar options. Off-site: Li'an Town (黎安镇) seafood restaurants, Xiangshui Bay (香水湾) and Qingshui Bay (清水湾) resort dining clusters approximately 15-30 minutes by car
surroundings.transport: Self-drive (free resort parking), Didi/taxi from Lingshui or Sanya, Lingshui public bus route 91 to 'Ocean Park' (海洋公园) stop, Hyatt Regency shuttle from Sanya Phoenix International Airport (paid)
surroundings.transport_to_nearest_airport: Approximately 80 km / 60-75 minutes drive from Sanya Phoenix International Airport (SYX); approximately 200 km / 2.5-3 hours drive from Haikou Meilan International Airport (HAK); nearest high-speed rail station is Lingshui (陵水站) on the Hainan East Ring High-Speed Railway, approximately 30 km / 30 minutes drive
surroundings.combined_itinerary: Pair with Qingshui Bay (清水湾) beach + Fenjiezhou Island (分界洲岛) day trip; combine with Boundary Island diving and Sanya East Coast tour; multi-day Hyatt Regency stay packages bundle Ocean Paradise + Water World + South China Sea Train monorail; can also extend to Wanning Riyue Bay (日月湾) for natural-wave surfing approximately 50 km north

pros: Newer integrated marine park + waterpark + Hyatt Regency hotel - one-stop family destination
Less crowded than Atlantis Sanya; better photo spots and shorter queues
Large 4,000+ m² wave pool with capacity for 2,000+ guests
Co-located 1,000-room Hyatt Regency offers high-quality on-site stay with direct park access
Family-friendly with strong child appeal: marine animals, dolphins, polar exhibits, plus the water park
cons: Water World operates seasonally (typically closed in winter months) while marine park stays open year-round
Less mature F&B and retail compared to Atlantis Sanya
Wave intensity is mild and family-oriented - not suitable for serious surfers or skill development
Located further from Sanya city center (75+ minutes drive); requires planning for transport
R&F Group financial restructuring concerns have raised occasional uncertainty about long-term operations [uncertain on current financial status]
reviews_reputation.user_reviews: Ctrip (携程) average rating approximately 4.5/5; Dianping (大众点评) reviews praise the marine animal exhibits and wave pool but note seasonal water-park closures and mid-day heat; Xiaohongshu (小红书) extensive positive coverage highlighting photogenic ferris wheel and dolphin shows; Mafengwo (马蜂窝) reviews recommend bundling with Hyatt Regency stay for best value [uncertain on exact current scores]
reviews_reputation.recommended_for: Families with children, multi-generational travelers, leisure tourists, photo/social-media visitors, hotel guests at Hyatt Regency, corporate group buyouts; NOT recommended for serious surfers seeking training waves
reviews_reputation.operator_brand_partnership: Owned and developed by R&F Properties (富力地产) cultural tourism division; on-site hotel operated under Hyatt Regency brand by Hyatt Hotels Corporation; marine animal program developed in partnership with international aquarium consultants; AAAA-level national tourist attraction designation awarded October 2022
